text:
stephen     2011-06-28 01:49:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/ocamlgsl        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    math/ocamlgsl/files  patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  - New port math/ocamlgsl
  
  ocamlgsl is an interface to GSL (GNU scientific library), for the
  Objective Caml langage.
  
  WWW: http://oandrieu.nerim.net/ocaml/gsl/
  
  PR:             ports/156307
  Submitted by:   Klaus Aehlig <aehlig@linta.de>
  Approved by:    maho (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.707     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/math/ocamlgsl/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/math/ocamlgsl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/math/ocamlgsl/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/math/ocamlgsl/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +106 -0    ports/math/ocamlgsl/pkg-plist (new)
